candidates.why: Explicit total revenue line; identical to Net sales and suitable as top-line revenue.
Direct sales/revenue line; same values as Total Revenue and likely the primary reported revenue label.

variables.notes: Both labels represent the same top-line revenue and appear to be duplicate reported labels across periods; using them as a priority list, not to be summed.

candidates.why: Direct COGS label matching the concept.
Duplicate/case-variant COGS label that may be used in some periods.

candidates.row_label: Cost of goods sold - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing row, not preferred when direct COGS rows exist.

variables.notes: Selected the direct COGS rows and excluded the balancing row per rules.

candidates.why: Possible overhead component, but appears only in earlier period and may relate partly to production.
Possible overhead/service cost component, but classification is less certain.
Clear SG&A component.
Clear SG&A component.
Broad overhead bucket and suitable SG&A-type operating expense excluding finance/tax lines.
Explicit SG&A row exists but appears empty in preview; per rule should be included along with component/overhead rows for coverage.
Case variant of selling expense label but appears empty in preview.
Case variant of personnel expense label but appears empty in preview.

variables.notes: An explicit SG&A row exists but is empty in the preview, so included it plus populated overhead components per hierarchy rule (b). Excluded depreciation/amortization and excluded likely production/service-cost rows.

candidates.why: Direct reported R&D/development expense line on the income statement.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization of prior capitalized R&D, not current-period R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset gross amount, not income statement R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset, not current R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research and Development Costs - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balance sheet balancing row, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: Selected the direct income statement R&D line and excluded balance-sheet R&D asset rows and amortization.

candidates.why: Best available broad finance-cost line; may include interest expense and is preferable when pure interest expense is not separately reported beyond lease interest.
Subset of financial expenses, but less clearly the main interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Explicit interest expense, but only for lease liabilities and likely incomplete for total interest cost.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate/variant of lease interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Using a priority list for the reported finance/interest line. Financial Expenses is likely the main recurring reported line; lease-interest rows are included as fallback labels if needed.

candidates.why: Direct equity line; no separate parent-equity line is shown.
Equivalent total equity line, same values as Equity.
Not book equity; includes liabilities and is therefore incorrect.

variables.notes: No separate parent/owners' equity line is present, so total equity is used as the BE measure. TOTAL EQUITY AND LIABILITIES was excluded.
No minority interest/non-controlling interest line appears on the balance sheet. Since BE uses total equity here, MIB is set to empty to avoid double counting.
